children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary may make a planning performance award in connection with a grant made, on or after , to an eligible recipient for a project under this subchapter located in an economic development district.October 27, 2004
the recipient actively participated in the economic development activities of the economic development district in which the project is located;
the project is consistent with the comprehensive economic development strategy of the district;
the recipient worked with Federal, State, and local economic development entities throughout the development of the project; and
the project was completed in accordance with the comprehensive economic development strategy of the district.

children.heading: Maximum amount
children.label: c Maximum amount
children.text: The amount of a planning performance award made under subsection (a) in connection with a grant may not exceed 5 percent of the amount of the grant.

children.heading: Use of awards
children.label: d Use of awards
children.text: A recipient of a planning performance award under subsection (a) shall use the award to increase the Federal share of the cost of a project under this subchapter.

children.heading: Federal share
children.label: e Federal share
children.text: Notwithstanding , the funds of a planning performance award may be used to pay up to 100 percent of the cost of a project under this subchapter.section 3144 of this title

children.heading: Funding
children.label: f Funding
children.text: The Secretary shall use any amounts made available for economic development assistance programs to carry out this section.
